title: FadeCommand NNG payload (start_fade)
description: JSON payload sent inside NodeOperation.data when dispatching a fade to gradient-motiond. target='gradientengine' on the NodeOperation envelope. The payload is built in two layers: ActionHandler._build_fade_payload returns a list[dict] (1 entry for AudioCue, N entries for VideoCue — one per layer in _layer_ids); NodeCommunications.send_fade_command is called once per dict, injecting envelope fields (command, fade_id, node_name, osc_host, curve_params). For VideoCue dispatches, fade_id is suffixed with the layer_id (f'{base_uuid}_{layer_id}') so gradient-motiond tracks per-layer completion. CANONICAL TRUTH: gradient-motion-engine src/signal/FadeCommand.cpp parseStartFade — field names, types, and required-set must match exactly or the daemon rejects the message (MissingField/TypeError/NodeMismatch/MalformedJson) and silently drops it (DropSilent for NodeMismatch). cancel_all uses the same envelope filter and so also requires node_name; see cancel_all.json once added.

command.description: Envelope. Discriminator: parseFadeCommand dispatches on this field. Injected by send_fade_command.

fade_id.description: Envelope. Controller-assigned unique identifier. AudioCue: str(FadeCue.uuid). VideoCue: f'{str(FadeCue.uuid)}_{layer_id}' (one per layer). Injected by send_fade_command via the fade_id kwarg.

node_name.description: Envelope. Target node identifier — must equal gradient-motiond's --node-name (defaults to gethostname()). parseFadeCommand returns NodeMismatch and silently drops the message if data.node_name != ownNodeName. Injected by send_fade_command as self.node_id.

osc_host.description: Envelope. OSC target host — always localhost for node-side players. Injected by send_fade_command.

osc_port.description: Body. OSC target port. AudioCue: target_cue._osc.remote_port. VideoCue: 7000.

start_value.description: Body. Initial level read from target_cue's Ossia node cache at dispatch time via target_cue._osc.get_value(osc_path). OSC native scale 0.0–1.0 for /volmaster and opacity.

end_value.description: Body. Target level on OSC scale 0.0–1.0. Computed as float(FadeCue.target_value) / 100.0 — Python normalises the FadeCue UI scale (0–100 integer) before the wire. gradient-motiond forwards this value to OSC verbatim with no further unit conversion (FadeMotion::evalAndSend uses end_value as-is).

start_mtc_ms.description: Body. MTC clock value in integer milliseconds at the moment of dispatch. Anchored to the cue's frozen_mtc_ms snapshot when available so the fade aligns with audio/video cues firing in the same GO; falls back to mtc.main_tc.milliseconds_rounded. Used by gradient-motiond to synchronise curve evaluation to the show timecode.

duration_ms.description: Body. Fade duration in integer milliseconds. Computed as FadeCue.duration.milliseconds_rounded.

curve_type.description: Body. Lowercase string encoding of FadeCurveType enum value. Consumed by gradient-motiond's CurveFactory.

curve_params.description: Envelope. Reserved for future curve parameterisation. Always empty object {} in Phase 6. Injected by send_fade_command.
